title: UPSSSC Junior Analyst Drugs Final Result 2026 for 361 Post
description: UPSSSC Junior Analyst Drugs Recruitment 2024 Final Result 2026 Post Update Date: 11-03-2026 Short Description: UPSSSC Junior Analyst Drugs Final Result 2026: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission has announced recruitment for 361 Posts of UPSSSC Junior Analyst Drugs. Candidates who want to apply online can apply from the link given on Rojgar Result. UPSSSC Junior Analyst Drugs Online Form 2024 can be filled from 18 April 2024 to 18 May 2024. .
